heading: Separability
label: 831cc Separability
text: The sections of this chapter are declared to be separable, and in the event any one or more sections of this chapter be held to be unconstitutional, the same shall not affect the validity of other sections of this chapter.
notes: Amendments1935—Act , reenacted provisions of this section without change.Aug. 31, 1935
amendments: Amendments1935—Act , reenacted provisions of this section without change.Aug. 31, 1935
